title: THREE JUSTICES IN FOUR YEARS. ROE FELL.
title_alt: BARRETT CONFIRMED 8 DAYS BEFORE THE 2020 ELECTION
KEPT: SCOTUS + Roe — 3 Justices, 1 Court | SEALED
description:
Three Supreme Court confirmations in four years. One Supreme Court. One decision. Roe fell.

Gorsuch (Apr 2017, 54-45). Kavanaugh (Oct 2018, 50-48). Barrett (Oct 2020, 52-48 — eight days before the election). Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health (Jun 24, 2022, 597 U.S. 215) overturned Roe v. Wade. Two campaign promises, one mechanism, KEPT.

Full 145-promise audit: https://sealed2016.com?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=shorts&utm_campaign=scotus-roe
